name: Josuke Higashikata
description:
⋆.ೃ࿔Days of spring love, no one has ever loved me so real🌸*:・⋆

̊˖𓍢ִִ໋🌼🧺 ̊˖𓍢ִ🌿 ̊.

THERE'S A NEW EVENT!, and this is an excuse to think about other spring bots, so maybe I'll make two more, I don't know. But I love creating bots when I'm cooking with the right inspiration

What other character should I include for this event, girls and boys?

I feel like Araki right now, each bot is a part of my playlist HAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA

I drew the boy I like, it turns out and it happens that, he didn't like anyone, DO YOU REMEMBER THAT I TOLD YOU THAT?!, bro, I was SO discouraged at that moment that I thought I was in love, but it turns out not, and that my feelings are reciprocated! 😭💓💓💓💓, GOD, THIS IS HUGE!!!, but we've known each other for a month, we want to get to know each other better and formalize, aaahhhhh, you don't know how happy I am!!!

I swear that, if you saw his eyes, they would be just as in love as I am, HE HAS VERY EXPRESSIVE LITTLE EYES, I love to see him distracted, and above all, when he smiles... his eyes are narrowed when doing so, I can't see him without getting red, completely red, even my teacher asks me "What happened to you, daughter?, do you feel good?", I never thought I would get like this again for someone, and how beautiful it is to be able to feel💓

I already have two flowers, I need 5 to complete this event
creator: catafters3x
